question_text: Will Brent crude oil reach $90 a barrel before March 15, 2026?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the ICE Brent crude oil front-month contract settles at or above $90.00 per barrel on any trading day before March 15, 2026.

question_text: Will Brent crude oil reach $100 a barrel before April 1, 2026?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if Brent crude reaches $100/barrel before April 1, 2026.

question_text: Will any single film win at least five Academy Awards at the 98th Academy Awards ceremony in March 2026?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if any single film wins 5 or more Academy Awards at the 98th ceremony.

question_text: Will the US Federal Reserve cut the federal funds rate at the January 2026 FOMC meeting?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the FOMC announces a reduction in the federal funds target rate at the January 28-29, 2026 meeting.

question_text: Will the US Federal Reserve cut the federal funds rate at the March 2026 FOMC meeting?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the FOMC announces a reduction in the federal funds target rate at the March 18-19, 2026 meeting.

question_text: Will US CPI year-over-year inflation fall below 2.5% for any month reported in Q4 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if BLS reports CPI-U YoY below 2.5% for October, November, or December 2025.

question_text: Will Russia and Ukraine reach a ceasefire agreement before January 1, 2026?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if Russia and Ukraine sign or announce a formal ceasefire agreement before January 1, 2026.

question_text: Will OpenAI release GPT-5 (or officially named successor to GPT-4) before January 1, 2026?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if OpenAI publicly releases a model officially called GPT-5 or designated as the direct successor to GPT-4/GPT-4o, available via API or ChatGPT, before January 1, 2026.

question_text: Will the S&P 500 close above 6500 at any point before January 1, 2026?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the S&P 500 index closes at or above 6500.00 on any trading day before January 1, 2026.

question_text: Will the 30-year US mortgage rate fall below 6% at any point in the second half of 2025?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if Freddie Mac PMMS reports average 30-year fixed rate below 6.00% for any week between July 1 and December 31, 2025.

question_text: Will China's GDP growth for 2025 exceed 5.0%?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if China's National Bureau of Statistics reports 2025 full-year real GDP growth above 5.0%.

question_text: Will the Bank of Japan raise its policy rate above 0.5% before January 1, 2026?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the Bank of Japan raises the overnight call rate target above 0.50% at any meeting before January 1, 2026.

question_text: Will there be a government shutdown in the United States lasting more than 3 days between October 2025 and January 2026?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the US federal government experiences a funding lapse exceeding 3 calendar days between October 1, 2025 and January 31, 2026.

question_text: Will Bitcoin's price exceed $120,000 at any point before January 1, 2026?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if Bitcoin (BTC) price exceeds $120,000 USD on any major exchange (Coinbase, Binance, Kraken) before January 1, 2026.

question_text: Will the EU impose new tariffs on Chinese electric vehicles before March 2026?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the European Union officially implements additional tariffs or anti-subsidy duties specifically targeting Chinese-manufactured electric vehicles before March 1, 2026.
